englishDefinitions: (uncountable) Gaming with one or more dice.
(uncountable, formerly countable, cooking) That which has been diced.
persianTranslation: (غیرقابل شمارش) بازی با یک یا چند تاس.
(قابل شمارش، توسط برخی منع شده است) مرگ.
(غیر قابل شمارش، سابقاً قابل شمارش، پختن) آن چیزی که بریده شده است.
examples:
1980, Benny Andersson and Björn Ulvaeus, “The Winner Takes It All”, Super Trouper, Polar Music
The gods may throw a dice / Their minds as cold as ice
Cut onions, carrots and celery into medium dice.
